## cli

<!-- cli-doc-start -->
```
A test CLI application with random commands

Usage:
  testcli [command]

Available Commands:
  completion  Generate the autocompletion script for the specified shell
  config      Manage configuration
  help        Help about any command
  server      Start the server
  version     Print version information

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for testcli

Use "testcli [command] --help" for more information about a command.
```
<!-- cli-doc-end -->
